contact_lookup_status: No role-specific recruiter name was verifiable from Bosch's public careers surfaces on 2026-03-27, so the letter uses Hiring Team as the fallback.
why_company: Bosch stands out to me because it combines Germany's engineering discipline with large-scale digital transformation, and the eCommerce domain sits exactly at the intersection of customer experience, operations, and structured process improvement where I can contribute strongly.
job_description: Bosch Germany is looking for a Business Analyst in the eCommerce domain who can translate business needs into clear requirements, improve workflows across digital commerce operations, collaborate with product, engineering, and business stakeholders, and support scalable process execution in a structured environment.
requirements: Business analysis in eCommerce or digital commerce environments
Ability to gather and document requirements clearly
Collaboration with product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders
Interest in digital transformation and data-driven execution
